pending.body: Add unit tests for extract_pe_bead_ids in task_prompt_contract.rs. The function parses prompt text to build the allowed PE bead ID set and is used in record_planned_elsewhere_amendments to validate mapped_to_bead_id — a bug here could silently accept hallucinated bead IDs or reject legitimate ones. Tests should cover: (1) normal bullet format '- 9ni.8.5.3 (description)', (2) no PE section in prompt returns empty set, (3) PE section with no bullets returns empty set, (4) multiple beads are all captured, (5) stops at next ## heading.

Validate `mapped_to_bead_id` before it can suppress a restart, and fail closed when there is no allowed mapping list. The current flow lets any accepted `mapped_to_bead_id` make `restart_required` false in `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:1569-1573`, but `record_planned_elsewhere_amendments()` explicitly skips validation when the extracted set is empty or the prompt cannot be read in `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:7614-7641`. That is reachable on the normal "no explicit planned-elsewhere items" prompt text emitted by `src/contexts/project_run_record/service.rs:1047-1050`, so a hallucinated real bead ID can bypass the reopen/fix loop and drop a legitimate finding.

Do not rely on the post-commit recorder as the enforcement point for planned-elsewhere validity. If a mapping is not allowed, it must be stripped or converted back into a normal amendment before the final-review outcome is committed. Right now `record_planned_elsewhere_amendments()` can reject a mapping as not in the allowed set in `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:7641-7656`, but the stage outcome has already been decided from the raw aggregate, and `reconstruct_missing_pe_mappings()` later recreates aggregate mappings without re-validating them in `src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs:975-1024`. An invalid planned-elsewhere classification can therefore still suppress a restart and even get written back into milestone state during reconciliation.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 18 -> Plan and Implement
